contentBlocks.original:
निधये सर्वविद्यानां भिषजे भवरोगिणाम् |
गुरवे सर्वलोकानां दक्षिणामूर्तये नमः ‖
contentBlocks.transliteration:
nidhaye sarvavidyānāṃ bhiṣaje bhavarogiṇām |
gurave sarvalokānāṃ dakṣiṇāmūrtaye namaḥ ‖
contentBlocks.translation: Salutations to Sri Dakshinamurti, the reservoir of knowledge (the abode of all learning), the healer of all those who suffer from the disease of samsāra, and the teacher of the whole world.
contentBlocks.meanings: निधये (nidhaye) – to the reservoir; सर्वविद्यानाम् (sarvavidyānām) – of all knowledge (sarva:all | vidyānām:of knowledge); भिषजे (bhiṣaje) – to the healer; भवरोगिणाम् (bhavarogiṇām) – of those afflicted by samsāra (bhava:samsāra | rogiṇām:of the afflicted); गुरवे (gurave) – to the teacher; सर्वलोकानाम् (sarvalokānām) – of all worlds (sarva:all | lokānām:of worlds); दक्षिणामूर्तये (dakṣiṇāmūrtaye) – to Dakshinamurti (dakṣiṇa:south | mūrtaye:to the form); नमः (namaḥ) – salutations;
